scripts.dev: concurrently "cd company-frontend && npm run dev" "cd company-backend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd company-frontend && npm run start" "cd company-backend && npm run start"
scripts.lint-all: npx chalk.bold.green '📦 Linting Backend...' && npm --prefix backend run lint && npx chalk.bold.green '📦 Linting Frontend...' && npm --prefix frontend run lint && npx chalk.bold.yellow '✨ Formatting Backend...' && npm --prefix backend run format && npx chalk.bold.yellow '✨ Formatting Frontend...' && npm --prefix frontend run format
